case_title: ROSE MATTHEW VS. EDURDO PANIAGUA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED JAN-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ASTURIAS, ELENA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ELENA ASTURIAS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MATTHEW, ROSE AS TO DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDURDO ASTURIAS, ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED JAN-19-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDURDO
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDURDO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-12-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MATTHEW, ROSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDURDO ASTURIAS, ELENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
